title: Bare Bones Short Swords Overlay
description: This resource pack changes the Bare Bones swords to be slightly shorter.
body: This pack is simply just an overlay for the Bare Bones Resource Pack and just makes the swords slightly shorter. It does include the copper sword texture, however it should work with version pre-1.21.9. You should ensure the pack is placed **above** the default bare bones pack to allow for the overlay to work correctly. Enjoy the pack!
